description: An agent needs to activate a planned in-game seasonal event (e.g., a Halloween event) across all game servers.

nodes.task_description: Verify the event start time and the list of event-specific assets (e.g., new items, map decorations).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms all event parameters and assets are correct.

nodes.task_description: Push the 'Halloween Event' configuration to all active game servers.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully applies the event configuration globally.

nodes.task_description: Post an announcement about the event on the game's official social media channels and community forums.
